## This is the GitHub Pages branch

The **gh-pages** branch contains an HTML version of [master's README.md](https://github.com/Strappazzon/tor-exit-page#readme).

If you are looking for the *Tor exit notice page* source code, please [switch to master](https://github.com/Strappazzon/tor-exit-page/tree/master).

### Running locally

- Install [Ruby](https://www.ruby-lang.org)
- Install [Bundler](https://bundler.io)
- Run `bundle install` to install the required dependencies
  - Only the first time
- Run `jekyll s` to serve the website locally
- Navigate to <http://127.0.0.1:4000/tor-exit-page>
